preview.summary: Ecuador's disciplined, defensively miserly side meet a Germany team blending youth and experience in a Group E clash. La Tri's organisation and counterattacks face Nagelsmann's creative midfield in a potential group decider.
preview.homeForm: Ecuador finished second in South American qualifying, conceding just five goals across 18 matches, the fewest of any side.
preview.awayForm: Germany, ranked 10th, eased through qualifying with five wins from six under Julian Nagelsmann.
preview.homeKey: Moises Caicedo: midfield engine driving Ecuador's qualifying run.
preview.awayKey: Florian Wirtz: creative spark and 2025 German Footballer of the Year.
storylines: Ecuador's elite defence faces Germany's creative attack
Wirtz and Musiala headline Germany's young core
Caicedo and Pacho anchor an organised Ecuador
preview.h2h: Their only World Cup meeting came in 2006, a 3-0 Germany win in the group stage.
